hero.title: The Tome
introBody: The Tome is about how Mōchirīī speaks, gathers & looks after each other.
Read it once, revisit it often & use it to remind yourself to be nice.

intro.title: A shared standard
body: The Tome keeps culture rooted across time zones & playstyles.
It sets expectations, explains how disputes get handled & describes how we keep guild life active & enjoyable for everyone.

tenets.title: Tenets
tenets.description: These tenets shape our tone in parties, chat & guild spaces so every member feels welcomed.
tenets.caption: A shared standard turns good intent into grounded conduct when disputes happen.
tenets.note: Choose one tenet before an event & carry it into the team together.

items.title: Harmony
items.description: Stay coordinated, be nice & communicate clearly.

items.title: Generosity
items.description: Offer help as an invitation & match the other person's pace.

items.title: Respect
items.description: Speak thoughtfully, assume good faith & leave room to recover from mistakes.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: Show up in small, repeatable ways that keep momentum & trust intact.

items.title: Craft
items.description: Improve with patience & pass knowledge in clear steps that others can follow.

items.title: Joy
items.description: Keep the guild bright by celebrating wins & having fun together.

etiquette.title: Etiquette
etiquette.description: Etiquette protects trust during fast play: chat tone, mentoring habits & how we settle disputes.

blocks.title: Chat
items: Keep messages simple, especially during events.
Welcome new members with simple replies & helpful feedback.
Be mindful with sarcasm & make it easy to opt out.

blocks.title: Mentoring
items: Offer help as an invitation & match the learner's pace.
Ask questions freely & answer with patience & specifics.
Share builds & tips in a way that leaves room for personal style.

blocks.title: Repair
items: Move tense topics to private messages early.
Bring in a hall leader when emotions rise or patterns repeat.
Restore trust through accountability & one clear next step.

blocks.title: Guild Code
items: Be kind in public spaces & make room for new members.
Respect real-life schedules, time zones & longer breaks.
Join events when available without pressuring casual members.
Ask leadership for help when a conflict or concern needs attention.

etiquette.note: Keep disputes private & actionable; return to the road with dignity.

rhythm.title: Rhythm
rhythm.description: Rhythm is our pace: enough structure to meet & grow, enough ease to keep play restful.
rhythm.caption: Mōchirīī favors patient participation & leaves room for real life.
rhythm.note: Post plans early, communicate changes plainly & keep the pace in reach.

items.title: Hall Runs
items.description: Posted with time zones, goals & RSVP notes when planning is needed; parties form with light role notes & clear start times.

items.title: Raffles
items.description: A thank-you for presence & spirit; rules stay pinned & winners are announced cleanly.

items.title: Notices
items.description: Patch notes that affect builds & guild decisions are shared with enough lead time to plan.

items.title: Quiet Time
items.description: Roam, farm, craft, or chat while staying connected to the guild at a pace that leaves room for real life.

recognition.title: Recognition
recognition.description: Recognition is how we say “we see you,” marking effort, care & consistency that helps others feel known.

items.title: Follow-through
items.description: Showing up over time through team play, events, chat help & small acts that keep the guild moving forward.

items.title: Service
items.description: Helping others progress, sharing knowledge, organizing parties & making guild spaces easier to use.

items.title: Composure
items.description: Keeping a clear tone under stress, honoring commitments & protecting harmony in public channels.
